title: Zacatecoluca Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Zacatecoluca, with a Z-Score of +5.14. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Zacatecoluca is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 17.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 44%, and the wind speed is 11.1 km/h, which is not providing much relief. 
 The lack of heating degree days, with an HDD of 0.0 GG, indicates that the focus is on cooling and mitigating the heat wave's effects.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols to ensure public safety and minimize disruptions.
